'''hothataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbled|rubbled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbled|rubbled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hothataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothatithi|hothatithi]] || [[word:hothatiji|hothatiji]] || [[word:hothatishi|hothatishi]] || [[word:hothatiki|hothatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothatuthuthu|hothatuthuthu]] || [[word:hothatujuju|hothatujuju]] || [[word:hothatushushu|hothatushushu]] || [[word:hothatukuku|hothatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothatuthu|hothatuthu]] || [[word:hothatuju|hothatuju]] || [[word:hothatushu|hothatushu]] || [[word:hothatuku|hothatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothatufthuf|hothatufthuf]] || [[word:hothatufjuf|hothatufjuf]] || [[word:hothatufshuf|hothatufshuf]] || [[word:hothatufkuf|hothatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothatethe|hothatethe]] || [[word:hothateje|hothateje]] || [[word:hothateshe|hothateshe]] || [[word:hothateke|hothateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothatothotho|hothatothotho]] || [[word:hothatojojo|hothatojojo]] || [[word:hothatoshosho|hothatoshosho]] || [[word:hothatokoko|hothatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothatotho|hothatotho]] || [[word:hothatojo|hothatojo]] || [[word:hothatosho|hothatosho]] || [[word:hothatoko|hothatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothatofthof|hothatofthof]] || [[word:hothatofjof|hothatofjof]] || [[word:hothatofshof|hothatofshof]] || [[word:hothatofkof|hothatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothatïfthïf|hothatïfthïf]] || [[word:hothatïfjïf|hothatïfjïf]] || [[word:hothatïfshïf|hothatïfshïf]] || [[word:hothatïfkïf|hothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothatïfthïfthïf|hothatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hothatïfjïfjïf|hothatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hothatïfshïfshïf|hothatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hothatïfkïfkïf|hothatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothatïfthïf|hothatïfthïf]] || [[word:hothatïfjïf|hothatïfjïf]] || [[word:hothatïfshïf|hothatïfshïf]] || [[word:hothatïfkïf|hothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothatïfthïf|hothatïfthïf]] || [[word:hothatïfjïf|hothatïfjïf]] || [[word:hothatïfshïf|hothatïfshïf]] || [[word:hothatïfkïf|hothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothatæthæ|hothatæthæ]] || [[word:hothatæjæ|hothatæjæ]] || [[word:hothatæshæ|hothatæshæ]] || [[word:hothatækæ|hothatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothatathatha|hothatathatha]] || [[word:hothatajaja|hothatajaja]] || [[word:hothatashasha|hothatashasha]] || [[word:hothatakaka|hothatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothatatha|hothatatha]] || [[word:hothataja|hothataja]] || [[word:hothatasha|hothatasha]] || [[word:hothataka|hothataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothatafthaf|hothatafthaf]] || [[word:hothatafjaf|hothatafjaf]] || [[word:hothatafshaf|hothatafshaf]] || [[word:hothatafkaf|hothatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hothatasha|hothatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothatshësha|hothatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothatrosha|hothatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothatmusha|hothatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothatyasha|hothatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothatnkshësha|gohothatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothatnkrosha|gohothatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothatnkmusha|gohothatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothatnkyasha|gohothatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hothathatasha|hothathatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothathatshësha|hothathatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothathatrosha|hothathatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothathatmusha|hothathatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothathatyasha|hothathatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothathatnkshësha|gohothathatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothathatnkrosha|gohothathatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothathatnkmusha|gohothathatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothathatnkyasha|gohothathatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hethætasha|hethætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hethætshësha|hethætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hethætrosha|hethætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hethætmusha|hethætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hethætyasha|hethætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohethætnkshësha|gohethætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohethætnkrosha|gohethætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohethætnkmusha|gohethætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohethætnkyasha|gohethætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hothfatasha|hothfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothfatshësha|hothfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothfatrosha|hothfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothfatmusha|hothfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothfatyasha|hothfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothfatnkshësha|gohothfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothfatnkrosha|gohothfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothfatnkmusha|gohothfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothfatnkyasha|gohothfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
